inputs.label: Account Balance
inputs.businessContext: The fair market value of the inherited IRA as of December 31 of the prior year.

businessContext_i18n.en: The fair market value of the inherited IRA as of December 31 of the prior year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir önceki yılın 31 Aralık tarihi itibarıyla miras alınan Bireysel Emeklilik Hesabı'nın (IRA) gerçeğe uygun piyasa değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der faire Marktwert des geerbten IRA zum 31. Dezember des Vorjahres.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La juste valeur marchande du compte IRA hérité au 31 décembre de l'année précédente.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor justo de mercado del IRA heredado al 31 de diciembre del año anterior.

inputs.label: Distribution Period
inputs.businessContext: Life expectancy factor from IRS Single Life Table or chosen distribution period in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Life expectancy factor from IRS Single Life Table or chosen distribution period in years.
businessContext_i18n.tr: IRS Tek Yaşam Tablosundan yaşam beklentisi faktörü veya yıl cinsinden seçilen dağıtım süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Lebenserwartungsfaktor aus der IRS Single Life Table oder gewählter Auszahlungszeitraum in Jahren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'espérance de vie selon la table IRS Single Life ou période de distribution choisie en années.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de esperanza de vida de la tabla IRS Single Life o período de distribución elegido en años.

inputs.label: Annual Growth Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual rate of return on the account, e.g., 5 for 5%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual rate of return on the account, e.g., 5 for 5%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hesapta beklenen yıllık getiri oranı, örn. %5 için 5.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Rendite des Kontos, z.B. 5 für 5%.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de rendement annuel attendu du compte, par exemple 5 pour 5%.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de rendimiento anual esperada de la cuenta, por ejemplo, 5 para 5%.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
